title: Lolium adzharicum
taxonomy: Lolium adzharicum is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a member of the genus Lolium, which includes several species of ryegrass. The genus Lolium is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. Lolium adzharicum is native to the Caucasus region and is closely related to other Lolium species found in the region. The classification of Lolium adzharicum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other grass species and its unique characteristics.
uses: Lolium adzharicum, also known as Adzharian ryegrass, is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
